div.h1: Differential Flame Graph: Before & After Comparison

div.p: "db_query went from 15% to 30% - it got worse!" CORRECT: db_query's share increased because we optimized parse_json. The absolute time for db_query may not have changed. Always check absolute sample counts, not just percentages.

ol.li: db_query: 150 → 300 samples = potential regression OR same work, larger share
Total time: may have decreased even though db_query's share increased

g.text: Width = comparison samples, Color = change direction
